note: v407: Budget audit fixes. Editing a repeating bill no longer rewrites its due day — a bill due the 31st, edited while February was on screen, used to save as the 28th; repeating bills now have their own day-of-month field instead of a date picker. Paid bills are struck through instead of dimmed, so they stay readable. Bills past their due date are flagged in amber, bills within a paycheck sort by due day, and the paid circle is a full 44px tap target. The paycheck amount field shows a focus ring, and every row is a real button so it stays keyboard-reachable after the page redraws.
